attr.title: Tomb Raider 1
attr.desc: An open source port of Tomb Raider 1 using OpenLara engine by xProger.
attr.inst: Just add your Steam or GOG Tomb Raider 1 files to the ports/tombraider1 subfolders: .phd under level, .ogg under audio and .rpl or .fmv under video. Works also with Epic Games version of Tomb Raider I-III Remastered.
